payload.answer: Rejected. Normal users cannot execute admin SQL or delete memory cards through this interface. No memories were deleted or committed.

entity_resolution.reason: Input is an administrative SQL command attempt, not a durable user memory fact.

details: Detected attempted admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No memory cards created, updated, or deleted.

repair_options: If you need to delete a specific memory, request deletion by describing the memory or its identifier through the supported user-facing deletion flow.
If you believe you need administrative access, contact an authorized administrator.
